insights.title: Unclear Business Name and Category
insights.details: The business name and category are either missing or not well-defined, making it difficult for AI algorithms to associate relevant entities or services. Clear, descriptive business naming enhances AI readiness.

insights.title: Lack of AI-Compatible Descriptions
insights.details: The current description lacks specific service details, keywords, and entities that would make it AI-friendly. Including full descriptions of services, products, and relevant keywords would improve AI integration.

insights.title: Negative Recent Reviews / Mentions
insights.details: The recent reviews and mentions indicate dissatisfaction or contain unstructured feedback, which may hinder AI understanding of customer sentiment and business reputation.

insights.title: Entity Verification Mismatch
insights.details: No OSM data retrieved and verified Outscraper data unavailable; the GBP data does not match any verified external entity, indicating a potential mismatch or missing data which reduces AI confidence in entity recognition.

findings.title: Missing or Mismatched Entity Data
findings.description: The absence of cross-validated entity data, including address, website, and Wikidata links, hampers AI algorithms from associating the business with authoritative external sources.
findings.impact: Decreases AI's ability to accurately categorize and optimize the business profile, affecting search relevance and visibility.
findings.fix_example: Update the GBP with verified address, website, and external links from authoritative sources like Wikidata or OSM once available.

findings.title: Insufficient Descriptive Content
findings.description: The current business description does not contain detailed, entity-rich content relevant to the services offered.
findings.impact: Limits the AI's capacity to generate rich, optimized content that can improve local SEO and user engagement.
findings.fix_example: Add comprehensive descriptions including specific services, keywords, and relevant entities to the business profile.
